description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure elevated on short stilts, with a wide, overhanging gable roof in dark gray. The front facade includes a covered wooden porch with railings and steps leading up from the lawn, providing a welcoming entryway. The exterior walls are primarily white, contrasted by natural wood elements on the porch, support beams, and under the roof eaves. Windows are modestly sized and symmetrically placed, with two on the rear wall and one on each side, allowing for natural light. The building sits on a rectangular grassy plot, suggesting a suburban or park-like setting. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on comfort and outdoor living.
description: A single-story bungalow with a wide gable roof, white walls, and a wooden front porch elevated on short stilts. The structure features symmetrical windows and sits on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: Rear view showing two small, symmetrically placed windows and the overhanging gable roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the solid white wall, the depth of the porch, and the roof's overhang.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wooden porch with railings, central steps, and the main entrance under the gable roof.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a single window and the side extension of the porch.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front and rear windows with single side windows
